interactions.description: Increased bleeding risk when combined
interactions.action: Avoid or monitor closely; consider alternative antiplatelet agent

interactions.description: NSAIDs increase warfarin effect and bleeding risk
interactions.action: Avoid NSAIDs; use acetaminophen instead

interactions.description: Fluconazole increases warfarin levels
interactions.action: Monitor INR closely; may need warfarin dose adjustment

interactions.description: Amoxicillin may increase methotrexate toxicity
interactions.action: Monitor renal function and MTX levels

interactions.description: Risk of lactic acidosis with iodinated contrast media
interactions.action: Hold metformin 48 hours before and after contrast procedure

interactions.description: ACE inhibitors increase potassium levels; additional K+ may cause hyperkalemia
interactions.action: Monitor serum K+; avoid potassium supplements unless needed

interactions.description: Increased risk of myopathy and rhabdomyolysis
interactions.action: Monitor CK levels; consider using fenofibrate instead

interactions.description: Both are AV-node blockers; risk of complete heart block
interactions.action: Avoid combination or use with extreme caution; monitor ECG

interactions.description: CYP3A4 inhibitor increases simvastatin levels; rhabdomyolysis risk
interactions.action: Use azithromycin or doxycycline instead; or suspend simvastatin

interactions.description: Omeprazole reduces clopidogrel effectiveness
interactions.action: Use famotidine or ranitidine instead of omeprazole

interactions.description: Verapamil increases digoxin levels; toxicity risk
interactions.action: Monitor digoxin levels; may need dose reduction

interactions.description: Combined K+ retention; risk of hyperkalemia
interactions.action: Monitor K+ levels closely if both required

interactions.description: NSAIDs increase methotrexate renal toxicity
interactions.action: Avoid NSAIDs; use acetaminophen for pain

interactions.description: May increase warfarin effect
interactions.action: Maintain consistent intake; monitor INR

interactions.description: Ciprofloxacin increases theophylline levels
interactions.action: Monitor theophylline levels; may need dose reduction

interactions.description: Tramadol may increase bleeding risk slightly
interactions.action: Monitor for bleeding; alternative analgesics preferred

interactions.description: Increased risk of lactic acidosis
interactions.action: Limit alcohol intake; avoid binge drinking

interactions.description: ACE inhibitor + K+ supplement = hyperkalemia risk
interactions.action: Monitor K+ levels; use only if necessary

interactions.description: Risk of serotonin syndrome
interactions.action: Avoid combination; consider alternative antidepressant or analgesic

interactions.description: Complex bidirectional interaction affecting both drugs
interactions.action: Monitor INR and phenytoin levels closely

interactions.description: CYP3A4 inhibitor increases statin levels; rhabdomyolysis risk
interactions.action: Use alternative antibiotic; or suspend simvastatin

interactions.description: Macrolide increases statin levels; myopathy risk
interactions.action: Use azithromycin or doxycycline instead

interactions.description: NSAIDs reduce ACE inhibitor effectiveness; renal risk
interactions.action: Monitor renal function; use acetaminophen for pain

interactions.description: Risk of contrast-induced nephropathy and lactic acidosis
interactions.action: Hold metformin 48 hours before and after contrast

interactions.description: Quinidine increases digoxin levels; toxicity
interactions.action: Monitor digoxin levels closely; may need 50% dose reduction
